items.text: We use technologies like cookies (small files stored by your browser), web beacons, or unique device identifiers to anonymously identify your computer or device so we can deliver a better experience. In the case of our website, our systems also log information like your browser, operating system, and IP address We may collect personally identifiable information that you provide to us, such as your name, address, phone number, or email address. With your permission, we may also access other personal information on your devices, such as your phone book, calendar, or messages, in order to provide services to you. From time to time, we may use this information to contact you via email to learn about your user preferences. You always have the choice to unsubscribe and not receive these emails. If authorized by you, we may also access your profile and other information from services like Facebook. We do not associate personal information with your activities (such as pages you view or things you click on or search for). We do not use, store or share your precise geographic location. We keep personal data for a limited period only. In the case of our applications/games, we remove personally identifiable information (such as your name, address, email, or phone number) and other preferences associated with your account promptly after you delete your account. We don’t share your personal data (such as name, address, email, or phone) with other companies nor do we do not allow advertising companies to collect data through our service. In the case of our applications/games, you can sign into your account to see any personally identifiable information we have stored, such as your name, email, address, or phone number. You can also contact us by email to request to see this information. We take reasonable steps to secure your personally identifiable information against unauthorized access or disclosure. For this purpose, we encrypt the transmission of data on pages where you provide payment information (in our app/games). We transfer personal information such as email addresses to a third-party service provider Mixpanel for access to usage analytics on some of our apps. By providing us with this data, you completely comprehend and unambiguously agree to the transfer, processing, and storage of such data.

To operate the service, we may make identifiable and anonymous information available to third parties in these limited circumstances: (1) with your express consent, (2) when we have a good faith belief it is required by law, (3) when we have a good faith belief it is necessary to protect our rights or property, or (4) to any successor or purchaser in a merger, acquisition, liquidation, dissolution or sale of assets. Your consent will not be required for disclosure in these cases, but we will attempt to notify you, to the extent permitted by law to do so. You can request to see your personal data at any time. We do not knowingly contact or collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe we have inadvertently collected such information, please contact us so we can promptly obtain parental consent or remove the information Information we collect may be stored or processed on computers located in any country where we do business.

Shared Notes (iOS Version) – MeetingMogul allows users to write shared notes (shared among attendees). Meeting participants can collaborate on these notes in real time. A real-time data server on FireBase serves as a connectivity hub between the MongoDB and MeetingMogul mobile client.
Here at azure.folio3.com, we take your privacy seriously and will only use your personal information to administer your account and to provide the products and services you have requested from us.
1. We may disclose information to third-party service providers but we will ensure that those service providers will protect your Personal Data in accordance with GDPR.
2. In response to legal process, for example, in response to a court order or a subpoena, a law enforcement or government agency’s request, or similar request.
3. We store information in a CRM system known as ProsperWorks for future correspondence through email or telephone. The data can be downloaded in CSV file format for use.

4. We also store data in the form of emails on our MailChimp account for promotional purposes and service offerings. This data can also be downloaded in Excel file format, and can easily be deleted upon the client’s request.
Other Important Information About Your Privacy
Limited access to the production database at the network level
Limited access to the production database at the process/users level
Password policy for access to the production database
Logging of actions and log analysis

azure.folio3.com uses cookies to give you the best online experience. If you continue to use this site, you agree to the use of cookies. You can turn cookies off by changing your browser settings. More information related to our cookies policy can be found here, along with the policies of our Dynamics, NetSuite, and SuiteCommerce divisions.
